title: Auckland Transport (10-Min Trains) web ad
displayTitle: 2016-07-02 - Unknown Committee - Auckland Transport (10-Min Trains) web ad

chunks.text: All the Bucklin trains had come a long way since back in the day. First they went electric and masses of people joined the movement. Now we're in the midst of the 10-minute train revolution. Yes, this is our time. Peek time. Trains every 10 minutes. It's truly liberating.
The 10-minute train revolution. Join the movement.
